name: joe-marketplace
description: A curated collection of Claude Code plugins for developer workflows

plugins.name: git-workflow
plugins.description: Automates the done-coding-to-PR-ready cycle: rebase, test, commit, and PR creation

plugins.name: dev-cycle
plugins.description: 4-team continuous improvement workflow: audit, scout, develop, and QA in autonomous loops

plugins.name: session-handoff
plugins.description: Save and restore structured session context for seamless handoffs between Claude Code terminals

plugins.name: downloads-organizer
plugins.description: Scan Downloads folder, classify files by project rules, and sort them into destinations with AI-assisted classification

plugins.name: workspace-tools
plugins.description: PostToolUse code validation, session-start environment detection, and project management for multi-terminal workflows
